steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is that “across cultures, people generally rated odors about the same.” This consistent rating pattern across different cultural and living groups is what the conclusion must follow from.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: The consistency of ratings across different modes of living means mode of living doesn't have a large influence on odor perception. The other choices either contradict the cross-cultural findings, introduce unsupported claims, or misread the data. That matches choice B — B is correct.
